creator: jack@crepinc.com
text:
Created attachment 155036
lang-sbcl-1.2.10.patch

This patch against HEAD brings sbcl to 1.2.10 (latest), and reenables the THREADS option. I've fixed the thread concurrency test simply by disabling the single failing test when the system is defined as freebsd; for reference, here's the test I've disabled:

---
Test SB-CONCURRENCY-TEST::MAILBOX.MULTIPLE-PRODUCERS-MULTIPLE-CONSUMERS failed
Form: (SB-CONCURRENCY-TEST::TEST-MAILBOX-PRODUCERS-CONSUMERS :N-SENDERS 50
                                                             :N-RECEIVERS 50
                                                             :N-MESSAGES 1000)
Expected values: (:RECEIVED . 50000)
                 (:GARBAGE . 0)
                 (:ERRORS . 0)
                 (:TIMEOUTS . 0)
Actual values: (:RECEIVED . 49993)
               (:GARBAGE . 0)
               (:ERRORS . 0)
               (:TIMEOUTS . 1).
---
